text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hello-lo! I'm Ines Fujin, and here's to our
brand-new partnership!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Just so you know, I've got a few part-time jobs I
balance. I'll make sure to schedule my shifts
around our training, so don't hold back and whip
me into shape!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna give both racing and work everything
I've got—that's how I'll repay my family for
supporting me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
